concepts.title: Equivalent stiffness in parallel combination
concepts.conceptBody:
Equivalent stiffness in parallel combination

$\operatorname{Keq} x=k_1 x+k_2 x+k_3 x$

$\text { Keq }=\left(\mathrm{k}_1+\mathrm{k}_2+\mathrm{k}_3\right)$

When a spring is cut into several parts, then, stiffness of each part will be inversly proportional to its length.
